description_long: This is a modern, rectangular chaise upholstered in a light beige fabric with a quilted diamond pattern on the exterior surfaces. The backrest and armrests are of equal height, forming a continuous, boxy enclosure around the seating area, and the interior is lined with matching fabric. Four loose, square cushions are arranged along the back and sides, providing additional comfort and support. The seat is wide and flat, designed to accommodate lounging or sitting, and the overall silhouette is clean and contemporary. The base of the chaise is not visibly elevated, suggesting a low-profile design with hidden or recessed legs. The neutral color and plush appearance make it suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A modern, boxy beige chaise with quilted upholstery, continuous back and armrests, and four loose cushions for comfort.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the solid, quilted backrest and the tops of the four cushions.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the quilted armrest and the linear arrangement of cushions along the back and side.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the open seating area, all four cushions, and the symmetrical armrests and backrest.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, with a clear look at the armrest and cushion placement.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is tall, straight, and continuous with the armrests, featuring a quilted diamond pattern and a plush, padded appearance. It is unsegmented and provides full support along the rear and sides of the seating area.
attribute_armrest_presence: Armrests are present on both sides, matching the height and style of the backrest, forming a boxy enclosure.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are not visible, suggesting a low-profile or recessed base, possibly with hidden supports or a platform structure.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery features a quilted diamond pattern on the exterior surfaces, while the seat and cushion surfaces are smooth and solid-colored.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are four loose, square cushions arranged along the back and sides, providing additional comfort and support. The cushions are evenly spaced and match the chaise's upholstery.
